headline: Sysco Just Announced a $29.1 Billion Acquisition and Wall Street Is Nervous. Can a 3% Dividend Sweeten the Deal?
summary: The Jetro deal strategically pushes Sysco into a faster‑growing, higher‑margin channel, but the new debt, jumping leverage, share dilution, and negative S&P outlook explain why SYY stock just had its worst day since 2020.

headline: Citi Lowers Sysco (SYY) Target Despite “Accretive” Deal Outlook
summary: Sysco Corporation (NYSE:SYY) is included among the 14 Cheap DRIP Stocks to Buy Now. On March 31, Citi lowered its price recommendation on Sysco Corporation (NYSE:SYY) to $72 from $88. It reiterated a Neutral rating on the shares. The firm said the stock declined after news of Sysco’s planned acquisition of Jetro Restaurant Depot. The […]
